from source import levenshtein

def test_levenshtein_with_equal_first_characters():
    source = "abc"
    target = "abd"
    expected_distance = 1

    distance = levenshtein(source, target)
    assert distance == expected_distance, f"Expected Levenshtein distance to be {expected_distance} but got {distance}"
